en: This is such a good arm workout / This really tones your arms
example: I started playing drums last month and my arms are already more toned — this is such a good arm workout!

zh: 我在小红书看过你的图片
en: I've seen your pics on RedNote / I caught your photos on Xiaohongshu
example: Oh I've seen your pics on RedNote — you post some really cool stuff!

zh: 我今天回家路上看见一条蛇
en: I ran into a snake on my way home / I spotted a snake on my way home
example: You won't believe it — I ran into a snake on my way home today!

en: And it's a venomous snake! / And on top of that, it's poisonous!
example: I ran into a snake on my way home today — and it's a venomous snake!

zh: 我知道，我就是很有魅力！
en: I know, I'm just charming like that! / I know, I've got that charm
example: Everyone keeps flirting with me — I know, I'm just charming like that!

en: When can you come in? / When are you free to book?
example: When can you come in for the appointment — maybe next Tuesday?

zh: 我经常不知道你在说什么
en: I'm lost half the time / You lose me sometimes
example: Honestly, you lose me sometimes — can you slow down and explain?
